inspirationSources.elements: Circular motion, ride numbering, ticket-based navigation, whimsical joy
inspirationSources.adaptation: Navigation pills styled as ride tickets; each view is a numbered ride with a fairground barker introduction. No literal carousel imagery or circular rotating layouts — the carousel feeling comes from horizontal card-flip transitions and the ticket metaphor.
inspirationSources.differentiator: Unlike a literal carousel UI, this uses pill-toggle navigation and card-based content grids rather than a rotating element.

inspirationSources.source: Cotton Candy and Carnival Food Aesthetics
inspirationSources.elements: Pastel pinks, mints, lemons, soft blues — the visual palette of carnival treats
inspirationSources.adaptation: Each stat card uses a different candy-inspired border color (cotton-candy pink, mint-swirl green, lemon-drop yellow, blueberry blue). The overall palette is warm cream with pastel accents.
inspirationSources.differentiator: Colors are used for functional differentiation (stat categories, priority levels) rather than purely decorative. No food imagery or textures.

inspirationSources.elements: Prize displays, balloon pops, spinning wheels, score displays
inspirationSources.adaptation: Ideas view is themed as a 'Balloon Pop' booth. The loading state uses a spinning prize wheel. Stat numbers animate with a spinning counter effect. Star burst emoji appears as micro-feedback.
inspirationSources.differentiator: Game booth metaphors are applied to functional UI patterns (form submission, loading states, notifications) rather than creating literal game interfaces.

inspirationSources.elements: Rounded pill buttons, toggle groups, floating action bars
inspirationSources.adaptation: The entire navigation system uses pill-shaped tickets. Priority selectors, tag badges, and action buttons all use the pill/capsule shape. This creates a cohesive rounded vocabulary.
inspirationSources.differentiator: Pills are combined with dashed borders and pastel fills to evoke carnival ticket perforations, distinguishing from standard SaaS pill components.

inspirationSources.adaptation: Fredoka One provides the bubbly, rounded heading style. Quicksand's geometric roundness for body text maintains the friendly tone while ensuring readability.
inspirationSources.differentiator: Typography choices are distinct from all prior passes — not using Nunito (P1/P2), Poppins (P3), Lato (P4), Cabin (P5), or Atkinson Hyperlegible (P6).

inspirationSources.elements: Card grids, drag-and-drop cards, card hover states
inspirationSources.adaptation: Cards are the primary content unit across all views. Cards lift and tilt on hover (like being picked up), flip between views, and bounce in on scroll reveal.
inspirationSources.differentiator: Card interactions use carnival-style exaggeration (tilt, bounce, squash-and-stretch) rather than subtle material design elevation changes.

pass1_chrome-diner-jukebox.differentiation: P1 uses a bottom jukebox bar, diner-themed panels, vinyl record cards. P7 uses floating top pill nav, fairground ride tickets, prize card layouts. P1 uses chrome trim and checkerboard patterns (anti-repeat items) — P7 uses none of these.

pass2_atomic-age-googie.differentiation: P2 uses space-age googie with boomerang shapes, parabolic curves, starbursts, orbital rings, dark navy panels. P7 uses soft pastels, pill shapes, card-based layouts with no geometric flourishes.

pass3_drive-in-movie-theater.differentiation: P3 uses dark purple palette, film marquee with chaser lights, cinematic widescreen layouts, film-reel transitions. P7 uses warm cream palette, carnival ride badges, card carousel layouts, card-flip transitions.

pass4_soda-fountain-pharmacy.overlap: Both use light palettes with soft colors
pass4_soda-fountain-pharmacy.differentiation: P4 uses cherry red + powder blue, floating bottom dock, awning stripe patterns, recipe-card shapes. P7 uses pink + mint on peach cream, floating top pill nav, carnival ticket patterns, prize card shapes.

pass5_motel-neon-roadside.differentiation: P5 uses dark asphalt palette, command-palette navigation, neon glow effects, roadside motel metaphor. P7 uses warm pastel palette, pill toggle navigation, pastel shadow blooms, fairground carousel metaphor.

pass6_kitchen-appliance-pastel.differentiation: P6 uses avocado green + harvest gold + copper, right-rail vertical dots timeline, kitchen appliance metaphor, recipe-box flip transitions. P7 uses cotton-candy pink + mint teal, floating top pill toggle, fairground carousel metaphor, horizontal card-flip transitions.
